response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and divided into scenes based on content (intro talk, animated intro, song performance, outro). 2. Performed web search for 'やがて女はきれいになるだろう つんく lyrics' to obtain song information and full lyrics. 3. Extracted metadata (Title: やがて女はきれいになるだろう, Composer: つんく). 4. Verified lyrics from search results and formatted into JSON structure.
response.global_summary: This video features a conversational introduction between two VTubers, followed by a musical performance of 'やがて女はきれいになるだろう', originally composed by Tsunku, before concluding with closing remarks.

scenes.description: The VTubers engage in an introductory conversation.
An animated intro sequence for the live show.
A musical performance of 'やがて女はきれいになるだろう'.

A life of flattering men, I cannot meet my true self
You know, dancing is SEXY, you are a good woman
You know, kissing is CRAZY, you are wonderful just as you are
I want to shine, I want to be loved

Why am I tearing up?
Eventually, a woman will become beautiful
So, if love is broken and you cannot trust anyone
Then cry as much as you want

So, fall in love again
Sometimes you're too absorbed, and you can't see what's around you
Isn't that fine?

So, if love is broken and you cannot trust anyone
Then cry as much as you want
